title: Peppery Chewy Middle Eastern Dates Stir-fry
description: This hangover-cure dish combines the sweet and fruity flavor of blackcurrant jam with the chewiness of dates and a peppery kick from fresh herbs, served as a light snack or breakfast.
instructions: In a bowl, combine the dates with half of the blackcurrant jam and lemon juice. Mix well.
Add minced garlic and harissa paste to the mixture. Stir until evenly coated.
Fold in chopped parsley and add the remaining blackcurrant jam. Gently stir everything together.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat, add a drizzle of olive oil if using.
Pour the prepared date mixture into the hot pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side or until the dates are slightly crispy and caramelized, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
